unit.note: touched-surface suites: shared/tests 3677 + shared/scripts/tests 196 + shared/scripts/tools/tests 129 + shipwright-security 470 + shipwright-compliance 952

integration.note: integration-tests (-m 'not slow'); no cross_component machinery touched

surface_verification.justification: Framework Python change to the shared security-scan-findings ingest + Semgrep tailoring; no web/UI surface exists. The touches_io_boundary round-trip IS the verification: a SARIF-ingest boundary test (build SARIF + workflow file, assert GH-owned tags drop, third-party kept, fail-safe KEEP incl. abs/.. traversal) plus an end-to-end import_findings integration test proving the recurring gh-security triage alarm is silenced for an opted-in adopted repo, with a causality guard. All touched-surface suites green (5598 tests).

behaviors.behavior: Opt-in default OFF: SARIF artifact-ingest unchanged (no drop, no owner I/O, no shape change)
Accept env ON + workflow_base: GH-owned (actions/*, github/*) mutable-action-tags dropped at ingest
Third-party unpinned mutable-tag stays counted under accept (supply-chain guard preserved)
Unresolvable owner (no workflow_base) leaves the finding KEPT (fail toward the signal)
Committed-tree drift (finding line no longer a GH-owned uses:) leaves the finding KEPT
base_dir enforces the repo-relative uri contract: absolute/.. uri rejected -> KEEP (over-suppression defense-in-depth)
Non-mutable-tag findings are never dropped by the accept channel
behaviors.evidence: py.high survives across every drop test in test_security_findings_gh_tag_drop.py

behaviors.behavior: End-to-end via import_findings: accepted GH-owned-only SARIF yields no gh-security triage item (alarm silenced)
End-to-end causality: the SAME SARIF without the accept env still emits the gh-security item
Grade path (refresh_ci_security) forwards project_root as workflow_base so the drop reaches the Control-Grade Security dimension too
inSource '# nosemgrep' suppressions are still honoured at ingest (regression guard)
Plugin local-scan predicate parity preserved after lifting the predicate to the shared util
